headline: Tractor Supply (TSCO) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance puts Tractor Supply in focus Tractor Supply (TSCO) has drawn fresh attention after its share price fell about 19% over the past month and roughly 40% over the past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess the rural retailer’s fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Tractor Supply. At a share price of US$31.62, Tractor Supply has seen its 30 day share price return fall 18.84% and its year to date share price return decline 37.79%, while the 1 year total shareholder...
